title: nepeta drassiana
intro: Nepeta drassiana, also known as Drass's catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoid compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antiseptic properties. Nepeta drassiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking a natural remedy for their health issues.
